title: [WIP] Return size on compatibility push
body:
Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/12468

[ NO NEW TESTS NEEDED] Not sure how to test.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name.  Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@jwhonce @vrothberg I am guess at this fix.  Not sure what size Docker is returning or how to get it on push.
@leahneukirchen could you try this out and tell me if this fixes your issue and the numbers look correct.

Docker code is at https://github.com/moby/moby/blob/229bc1ee8bd3939634a5eb3bfebfd59aed399e2d/distribution/push_v2.go#L229

I ripped out the code in our codebase, it was only assuming `size:` was there and did not use the actual value.

This could be used as a test case maybe, I can't compile podman myself right now:

```
% docker pull alpine:latest
latest: Pulling from library/alpine
59bf1c3509f3: Pull complete 
Digest: sha256:21a3deaa0d32a8057914f36584b5288d2e5ecc984380bc0118285c70fa8c9300
Status: Downloaded newer image for alpine:latest
docker.io/library/alpine:latest
% docker tag alpine:latest leahneukirchen/justatest
% docker push leahneukirchen/justatest
Using default tag: latest
The push refers to repository [docker.io/leahneukirchen/justatest]
8d3ac3489996: Mounted from library/alpine 
latest: digest: sha256:e7d88de73db3d3fd9b2d63aa7f447a10fd0220b7cbf39803c803f2af9ba256b3 size: 528
```

Perhaps `podman push` should also print that info?
Yes, I am just waiting for @vrothberg to verify what I am doing as far as size. As I almost guarantee I am doing something wrong.
